title: National Dosimetry Services: Manage your billing statements - Canada.ca
content:
## Your NDS account: Manage your billing statements
- Apply for dosimetry services and order dosimeters
- Manage your billing statements
- Request additional services
Electronic Billing Registration Form – PDF link
Your billing statements, also known as your Account Activity  Report (AAR), will be mailed periodically throughout the year. The timing and  number of AARs you receive depends on your dosimetry wearing period frequency:
- AARs will be issued on a quarterly basis for quarterly  service groups
- AARs will be issued on a monthly basis for semi-monthly  and monthly service groups
If you would like to receive your AARs at an address other than your dosimeter delivery address, please call our Client Services Section at 1-800-261-6689 for assistance.
If you would like to receive your AARs via email instead of letter mail, please submit the completed Electronic Billing Registration Form by:
email: nds-snd@hc-sc.gc.ca Note: The information submitted to NDS using the above email address will be processed by Computer-Talk, a third party routing application used to support the Call Centre’s workflow. For information on how the third party handles your information, please visit Computer-Talk’s Privacy Policy .
mail: National Dosimetry Services Health Canada 775 Brookfield Road, Address Locator 6301D Ottawa, Ontario, K1A 1C1
